meaning: adj.不仁慈的,无情的,残酷的
examples: They chatted for an unmerciful length of time.
Unmerciful edge of knife keep on at innocent frontal eminence.
You have a vicious, greedy, unmerciful financial Wolf standing over a cowering, unsophisticated commercial Lamb.
How he came up with such wonderful material with such unmerciful deadlines staring him right in the face is a marvel.
